pred.events_leading: Patient found at a nursing facility with an acute onset of cerebral infarction.

gold.events_leading: Patient was found with altered mental status at a nursing facility after complaining of neck pain earlier. He then had a nosebleed and vomited blood.

pred.events_leading: Patient has had a fever, weakness, and diarrhea for several days, leading to a fall from his bed.

gold.events_leading: Bed-confined patient with a multi-day history of fever and weakness fell out of bed, resulting in abdominal pain. He subsequently developed respiratory distress and had an episode of hematemesis.

pred.events_leading: Patient was a driver in a minor motor vehicle collision and developed rapid shortness of breath.

gold.events_leading: Patient was involved in a minor motor vehicle collision and subsequently developed acute shortness of breath and a declining level of consciousness.

pred.events_leading: Patient felt sick all day with a cough, and was found slumped over at her desk by a coworker.

gold.events_leading: Patient felt progressively weaker with a cough throughout the day at work and was found slumped over at her desk by a coworker.

pred.primary_impression: Encounter for general adult medical examination without abnormal findings
pred.events_leading: Patient experienced a syncopal episode while watching a play at a school.

gold.events_leading: Patient had a syncopal episode while watching a play at a high school auditorium, followed by an episode of hematemesis.

pred.events_leading: Patient was found by family with an empty bottle of Xanax next to her.

gold.events_leading: Patient was found by family next to an empty bottle of Xanax.

pred.events_leading: Patient experienced a sudden onset of severe abdominal pain while watching television, followed by two episodes of hematemesis.

gold.secondary_impression: Encounter for general adult medical examination without abnormal findings
gold.events_leading: Patient initially called for eye problems but then developed sudden, severe abdominal pain followed by two episodes of hematemesis.

pred.events_leading: Patient experienced a sudden onset of generalized abdominal pain, shoulder pain, and fatigue while at a commercial establishment.

gold.events_leading: Patient developed breathing problems, abdominal pain, and shoulder pain while at a commercial establishment.

pred.events_leading: Patient has had a two-day history of fever and nausea, followed by the onset of extreme dizziness and weakness.

gold.events_leading: Patient experienced two days of fever and nausea, followed by the acute onset of dizziness, weakness, and neck pain.

pred.events_leading: Patient experienced a syncopal event at a trade/service area, prompting bystanders to call 911.
procedures: Moving a patient to a stretcher
Moving a patient to a stretcher
gold.events_leading: Patient was found after a bystander-witnessed syncopal event, initially reported as a seizure.

pred.events_leading: Family called due to patient's not acting right. Patient found alert but complaining of shortness of breath and profound weakness.

gold.events_leading: Family called for behavioral changes; patient was found to have shortness of breath, weakness, and abdominal pain following a two-day history of diarrhea.

pred.events_leading: Patient was found slumped over at a department store after an episode of hematemesis.
pred.medications_given: Fentanyl 59.62mg SL | EPINEPHrine 0.1 MG/ML 1.13mg PO | Aspirin 323.49mg IV

gold.events_leading: Patient collapsed in a department store following an episode of vomiting blood.

pred.events_leading: Patient experienced a fall at a school, resulting in weakness and fever.

gold.events_leading: Patient was feeling weak and feverish, which resulted in a fall at a school.

pred.events_leading: Patient collapsed in a classroom at a school.

gold.events_leading: Patient collapsed in a classroom and was found by school staff.

pred.events_leading: Patient's roommate found him unconscious at his residence, believing it was an OD.

gold.secondary_impression: Encounter for general adult medical examination without abnormal findings
gold.events_leading: Patient was found unconscious by his roommate, who administered oral Naloxone prior to EMS arrival.

pred.events_leading: Family called due to patient's worsening shortness of breath, preceded by three days of diarrhea, abdominal pain, and painful urination.

gold.events_leading: Patient experienced worsening shortness of breath over one day, following a three-day history of diarrhea, abdominal pain, and dysuria.

pred.events_leading: Patient found on the street by bystanders complaining of chest pain, but upon EMS arrival he appeared very fatigued and confused.

gold.events_leading: Bystanders called for chest pain; patient was found confused and fatigued but denying pain.

pred.events_leading: Patient complained of her back hurting at work, then became difficult to arouse.
procedures: Moving a patient to a stretcher
Moving a patient to a stretcher
gold.events_leading: Patient was at work when she complained of back pain, then became difficult to arouse. Found responsive only to painful stimuli by EMS.

pred.primary_impression: Encounter for general adult medical examination without abnormal findings
pred.events_leading: Patient was assisted to a chair by staff.

gold.events_leading: Patient developed severe back pain after being assisted from his bed to a chair by staff.

pred.secondary_impression: Urinary tract infection, site not specified
pred.events_leading: Patient was found weaker than usual by staff at a reform school with new onset diarrhea and tachycardia.

gold.secondary_impression: Urinary tract infection, site not specified
gold.events_leading: Patient was found by staff with new onset weakness and confusion, accompanied by diarrhea.
